module_info.docstring:
Channel directory -- cached map of reachable channels/contacts per platform.

Built on gateway startup, refreshed periodically (every 5 min), and saved to
~/.hermes/channel_directory.json.  The send_message tool reads this file for
action="list" and for resolving human-friendly channel names to numeric IDs.

functions.name: build_channel_directory
functions.docstring:
Build a channel directory from connected platform adapters and session data.

Returns the directory dict and writes it to DIRECTORY_PATH.

functions.name: _build_discord
functions.docstring: Enumerate all text channels the Discord bot can see.

functions.name: _build_slack
functions.docstring: List Slack channels the bot has joined.

functions.name: _build_from_sessions
functions.docstring: Pull known channels/contacts from sessions.json origin data.

functions.name: load_directory
functions.docstring: Load the cached channel directory from disk.

functions.name: resolve_channel_name
functions.docstring:
Resolve a human-friendly channel name to a numeric ID.

Matching strategy (case-insensitive, first match wins):
- Discord: "bot-home", "#bot-home", "GuildName/bot-home"
- Telegram: display name or group name
- Slack: "engineering", "#engineering"

functions.name: format_directory_for_display
functions.docstring: Format the channel directory as a human-readable list for the model.
